root.name: Change font size of main title on first slide to make it larger
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully enlarged the font size of the main title 'Texts and Human Experiences' on the first slide, without introducing any extraneous changes.

children.name: Font size of main title is increased on first slide
children.description: Checks that the font size of the main title 'Texts and Human Experiences' on the first slide was increased.

children.name: Main title text unchanged except for font size
children.description: Checks that the text content of the main title was not modified except for font size.

children.name: No extraneous changes made to other elements on first slide
children.description: Checks that only the main title was modified, and all other shapes/elements on the first slide remain unchanged.

children.name: No extraneous changes elsewhere in presentation
children.description: Checks that slides other than the first slide, and global presentation properties, were not altered.

metadata.task: Change the font size of the main title 'Texts and Human Experiences' on the first slide to make it larger
